entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., an important crop in Malawi and Zambia valued for soil improvement and economic gain.

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: A country in Africa where peanut production and aflatoxin contamination are significant.

entities.name: ZAMBIA
entities.description: A country in Africa where peanut production and aflatoxin contamination are significant.

entities.name: SOIL IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The benefit provided by peanuts in cereal-based cropping systems.

entities.name: CEREAL-BASED CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems where peanuts are used to improve soil.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A key challenge in peanut production affecting health and trade in Malawi and Zambia.

entities.name: MITIGATION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies used to reduce or eliminate aflatoxin contamination in peanuts.

entities.name: HEALTH
entities.description: Human well-being impacted by the consumption of aflatoxin-contaminated peanuts.

entities.name: TRADE
entities.description: The formal and informal exchange of peanuts, affected by aflatoxin contamination levels.
